emails.subject: Re: Hard Facts Needed
emails.body: Bryan In fact, in order to get this first list of 200 or so on the non-transactional web page, we conducted only a very brief legal review in Houston th full review takes much longer since it involves input from a variety of people. Mark Bryan Seyfried 02/27/2000 05:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: Hard Facts Needed
emails.body: let's discuss exactly what needs to be done, we can choose a subset of the currently approved names to get started. have you spoken with louise?
